queries.question: What are the names and descriptions of the facilities common to all terminals?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.facilityName, Facilities.description  from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id   GROUP BY Terminals_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Terminals_Facilities.terminalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Terminals)

queries.question: Give me the description of the facilities available at each terminal.
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.description  from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id   GROUP BY Terminals_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Terminals_Facilities.terminalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Terminals)

queries.question: Give me the description of the facilities available at each terminal.
queries.sql: select terminals.name , facilities.description from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?terminals_facilities a :Terminals_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facility .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
  ?terminals p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Which facilities are common to all terminals?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.facilityName  from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id   GROUP BY Terminals_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Terminals_Facilities.terminalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Terminals)

queries.question: Which facilities are present at all terminals?
queries.sql: select terminals.name , facilities.facilityname from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?facilityname WHERE {
  ?terminals_facilities a :Terminals_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facility .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
  ?terminals p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:facilityName ?facilityname .
}

queries.question: For every terminal, list the names and descriptions of the facilities they have.
queries.sql: select terminals.name , facilities.facilityname , facilities.description from Terminals_Facilities join Facilities on Terminals_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Terminals on Terminals_Facilities.terminalId = Terminals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?facilityname ?description WHERE {
  ?terminals_facilities a :Terminals_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facility .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?terminals_facilities p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
  ?terminals p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:facilityName ?facilityname .
  ?facilities p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the names and descriptions of the facilities each terminal has.
Which facilities are present at all terminals?
Give me the description of the facilities available at each terminal.
